rulings.Case Title: PORCIA'S, LLC ET AL VS. LYLE A OLDER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings To Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 18, 2016, Line 1 - DEFENDANT ANDREW IWACH's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. Continued to June 1, 2016 on the court's own motion. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHAUNAK SAYTA VS. EDMUND CHU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement (Ccp Sec. 664.6)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 18, 2016, Line 2 - PLAINTIFF SHAUNAK SAYTA's Motion To Enforce Settlement (Ccp Sec. 664.6). DENIED. The court finds there is no violation of the agreement: (a) the moving party failed to notify the rent board of the settlement agreement; (b) the moving party failed to stipulate to sealing the records with the rent board. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KATHLEEN NEEDHAM VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 18, 2016, Line 3 - DEFENDANTs VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. and SHELLEY TREW's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off calendar per notice of settlement. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KATHLEEN NEEDHAM VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 18, 2016, Line 3 - DEFENDANTs VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.,and SHELLEY TREW's Motion To Strike The Complaint. Off calendar per notice of settlement. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID JARAMILLO ET AL VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 18, 2016, Line 4 - DEFENDANT BALWANTSINH THAKOR's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, Defendant must answer within ten (10) days of the Notice of Entry of Order. Plaintiff has sufficiently alleged facts to support a cause of action for specific performance and breach of contract. The demurrer to Plaintiff's second and third cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HUDSON RINCON CENTER, LLC, ET AL VS. DEEM SUM INTERNATIONAL, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition And Petition Of Defendant To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 18, 2016, Line 5 - DEFENDANT DEEM SUM INTERNATIONAL, INC.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Action. Hearing is required to determine the arbitrability of the agreement. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EVERGREEN HOLDINGS, INC. VS. ALBERT MIKLOS KUN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Awarding Attorneys' Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 18, 2016, Line 7 - PLAINTIFF EVERGREEN HOLDINGS, INC.'s Motion For Order Awarding Attorneys' Fees. GRANTED as to Defendants Caroline Allen and David Luna ONLY. Plaintiff was the prevailing party and the fees are reasonable. Plaintiff's motion as to Albert Kun is withdrawn without prejudice. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRIAN C. HUNT ET AL VS. ROBERT P. DODD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 18, 2016, Line 8 - DEFENDANT ROBERT DODD's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED. Complaint sets forth sufficient facts per the causes of action. Defendant must answer within ten (10) days of the Notice of Entry of Order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRIAN C. HUNT ET AL VS. ROBERT P. DODD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 18, 2016, Line 8 - DEFENDANT ROBERT DODD's Motion To Strike Complaint. GRANTED. Plaintiff is has 5 days to amend the complaint from Notice of Entry of the order to include the fair rental value. =(501/REQ)
